item.title: Stata and AI Agents: A Powerful Pair for Empirical Work
item.author: 滑翔闪
item.description: In 2026, empirical researchers are weaving AI into their data workflows every day.

item.title: Optimize Your TexStudio Editing Experience
item.author: 滑翔闪
item.description: For Chinese-speaking users, there is probably nothing more frustrating than wanting to type $$ but ending up with ￥￥ due to not switching input methods in time. 🙃

item.title: Aggregated subscriptions: free movies, comics
item.author: 滑翔闪
item.description: Introducing software for aggregating subscriptions, which consolidates and manages various website resources for movies, TV shows, and comics.

item.title: Zotero: RSS Feed Aggregation Subscription
item.author: 滑翔闪
item.description: GPT: The guide introduces economic journal RSS subscriptions, detailing various types of feeds and how to import them into Zotero. It covers a range of prestigious journals like AER, Econometrica, and QJE, providing direct RSS links for latest issues, advance access, open access. Additionally, it mentions platforms like Elsevier and CNKI for accessing foreign journals and offers interesting feeds like Zhihu Daily Selection and Terence Tao Blog.
